# Iterable Unboxed: Embedded Messaging

Webinar

# Iterable Unboxed: Embedded Messaging

June 3, 2026

8:30 am (PDT) / 11:30 am (EDT) / 4:30 pm (BST)

60 minutes

## Building Native Experiences That Drive Engagement

Modern customer engagement shouldn’t feel like a distraction – it should feel like part of the product. Yet, many teams struggle to bridge the gap between their marketing strategy and the native app experience, leading to disjointed customer journeys.

In this session of _Iterable Unboxed_, we’ll show you how to use Embedded Messaging to create seamless, non-intrusive experiences that feel built-in, not tacked on.  
What we will cover:

*   Defining Embedded Messaging: How it differs from standard push or in-app notifications and why it’s critical for native UI integration.
*   The Power of Integration: Learn how Embedded Messaging works alongside your existing channel strategy and how it leverages Unknown User Activation (UUA) to engage users before they even sign in.
*   Real-World Application: A deep dive with Sandboxx on their implementation journey and impact on user experience.
*   Product Tour: A technical walkthrough of the setup and execution within the Iterable platform.

Join us to learn how to move beyond rigid, interruptive messaging and start building experiences that feel like a native part of your brand.
